description: eMathica Capability Registry — machine-readable registry of all capabilities across all domains.

capabilities.name: Play parameter animation
capabilities.notes: Inline slider auto-play in ParameterObjectRowView.

capabilities.name: Canonicalize expression
capabilities.notes: Converts Expr to canonical form. Includes quadratic/conic extraction.

capabilities.name: Differentiate expression
capabilities.notes: User-facing feature via ObjectPanel 'Differentiate' action.

capabilities.name: Factor expression
capabilities.notes: Not yet implemented.

capabilities.name: Integrate expression
capabilities.notes: Not yet implemented.

capabilities.name: Compute limit
capabilities.notes: Not yet implemented.

capabilities.name: Normalize expression
capabilities.notes: Standard algebraic normalization.

capabilities.name: Solve equation
capabilities.notes: Partial implementation. Needs verification for equation types supported.

capabilities.name: Apply document command
capabilities.notes: 13 command cases. Atomic application via EMathicaDocument.apply().

capabilities.name: Execute undo
capabilities.notes: Snapshot-based undo. Max 100 steps.

capabilities.name: Dispatch workspace command
capabilities.notes: 30+ command cases. Routes to ModuleCommandHandler for module-specific.

capabilities.name: Apply delete source object policy
capabilities.notes: Two strategies: unlink (retain static geometry) vs deleteAffected (cascade delete). Not formally frozen.

capabilities.name: Create dependency edge
capabilities.notes: 7 dependency kinds: midpoint, parallel, perpendicular, intersection, circleByCenter, circleByRadius, arcByThreePoints

capabilities.name: Detect dependency cycle
capabilities.notes: DependencyGraph is an empty struct placeholder. Critical for safety.

capabilities.name: Add object to document
capabilities.notes: Via DocumentCommand.addObject → EMathicaDocument.apply. Requires document mutation permission.

capabilities.name: Encode/decode .emathica package
capabilities.notes: ISO8601 dates, prettyPrinted, sortedKeys.

capabilities.name: Save document to disk
capabilities.notes: Writes metadata.json + document.json + preview.png. Atomic write strategy.

capabilities.name: Record object conversion history
capabilities.notes: Planned for .emathica/trans.json. Records materialize conversion history.

capabilities.name: Export PDF document
capabilities.notes: Not yet implemented.

capabilities.name: Export PNG image
capabilities.notes: preview.png generation is a base, but full export needs options (transparent bg, custom size, etc.)

capabilities.name: Export SVG vector
capabilities.notes: Not yet implemented.

capabilities.name: Define Math AST
capabilities.notes: Core type definition. Foundation of all math expression handling.

capabilities.name: Analyze formula diagnostics
capabilities.notes: Produces user-visible error diagnostics.

capabilities.name: Parse LaTeX to AST
capabilities.notes: Needs verification: parse boundaries between WorkspaceKit and future MathInputKit

capabilities.name: Parse source text to Expr
capabilities.notes: Canonicalizes user text input to Expr.

capabilities.name: Lower MathNode to semantic state
capabilities.notes: Internal pipeline step.

capabilities.name: Serialize Expr to JSON
capabilities.notes: Via Codable conformance. Foundation for save/load.

capabilities.name: Unicode fallback formula rendering
capabilities.notes: 20+ substitution rules. Fallback when image render fails.

capabilities.name: Render LaTeX formula to image
capabilities.notes: EMathicaMathRenderService + TextSubstitutionRenderService fallback.

capabilities.name: Define 2D arc geometry
capabilities.notes: Three-point arc. MathCore version only; DocumentSystem copy missing this.

capabilities.name: Compute geometry intersection
capabilities.notes: Needs verification: should move to GeometryCore package

capabilities.name: Define 2D point geometry
capabilities.notes: Core geometry type definition.

capabilities.name: Detect discontinuity in samples
capabilities.notes: maxAbsCoordinate=1e12 guard, discontinuityThreshold=1000

capabilities.name: Math keyboard layout
capabilities.notes: 4 tabs: numbers, functions, alphabet, symbols.

capabilities.name: Render inspector sections
capabilities.notes: 3 tabs: Object, Canvas, Calculator.

capabilities.name: Edit object style in inspector
capabilities.notes: Color picker, opacity slider, line width, point size, line style.

capabilities.name: Convert curve to table
capabilities.notes: Sample the function at N points -> (x, f(x)) table. Safety: Warning.

capabilities.name: Convert curve to audio wave
capabilities.notes: Sample the function over time → audio waveform.

capabilities.name: Convert parametric curve to table
capabilities.notes: Sample (x(t), y(t)) at N values of t -> (t, x, y) table. Safety: Warning.

capabilities.name: Convert point.2d to point.3d
capabilities.notes: Materialize conversion. z=0 by default. Records in .emathica/trans.json.

capabilities.name: Convert point.3d to point.2d
capabilities.notes: Materialize conversion. Drops z coordinate (xy projection). Safety: Warning.

capabilities.name: Convert point set to table
capabilities.notes: Enumerate point set positions as (x, y) rows. Safety: Safe.

capabilities.name: Convert surface to implicit 2D curve
capabilities.notes: Project surface z=f(x,y) onto plane as implicit curve f(x,y)=c. Safety: Caution (significant information loss).

capabilities.name: Convert table to curve
capabilities.notes: Interpolate table data -> explicit function f(x). Safety: Warning (interpolation approximation).

capabilities.name: Convert table to point set
capabilities.notes: Extract (x, y) pairs from table as 2D point set. Safety: Safe (lossless for proper columns).

capabilities.name: Object UUID identity
capabilities.notes: Foundation of object system. let id = UUID is immutable.

capabilities.name: Define object kind
capabilities.notes: Current: function,point,circle,segment,line,ray,parameter,parameterGroup,arc

capabilities.name: Compose plugin block
capabilities.notes: Combines multiple capabilities into a user-composable block.

capabilities.name: Expose capability to plugins
capabilities.notes: Key infrastructure for Scratch-style plugin system.

capabilities.name: Define plugin manifest
capabilities.notes: Design phase. Execution pipeline not yet implemented.

capabilities.name: Define plugin protocol
capabilities.notes: Basic protocol: id, displayName. Execution not defined.

capabilities.name: Generate draft preview
capabilities.notes: Uses Expr→AlgebraClassification→SemanticSampling→LegacySampling pipeline.

capabilities.name: Render project preview
capabilities.notes: Two-pass bounds estimation. 3-level degradation: Geometry→Semantic→Legacy.

capabilities.name: Generate project thumbnail
capabilities.notes: Default 620x400. Used by LocalProjectStore on save.

capabilities.name: Hit test selectable objects
capabilities.notes: 12pt point radius, 12pt line/curve threshold. Needs verification: move to shared SelectionKit?

capabilities.name: Glass panel UI style
capabilities.notes: Already packaged in EMathicaThemeKit.

capabilities.name: Workspace shell container
capabilities.notes: 991行 WorkspaceView + 1932行 WorkspaceState. Already well-packaged.
